Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 264 upvotes, 33 comments
  2. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 17 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Oscar Reutersvärd (2021) 47 upvotes, 4 comments
  4. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 139 upvotes, 21 comments
  5. Do your own writing 624 upvotes, 204 comments
  6. How to turn anything into a router 713 upvotes, 248 comments
  7. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1222 upvotes, 447 comments
  8. 7,655 Ransomware Claims in One Year: Group, Sector, and Country Breakdown 37 upvotes, 7 comments
  9. Good CTE, Bad CTE 95 upvotes, 26 comments
  10. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 372 upvotes, 132 comments
  11. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 607 upvotes, 232 comments
  12. Combinators 19 upvotes, 3 comments
  13. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 200 upvotes, 81 comments
  14. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 421 upvotes, 198 comments
  15. Multiple Sclerosis 10 upvotes, 1 comments
  16. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 357 upvotes, 181 comments
  17. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 680 upvotes, 366 comments
  18. Anthropic: Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected' 68 upvotes, 31 comments
  19. GitHub backs down, kills Copilot pull-request ads after backlash 383 upvotes, 227 comments
  20. We're Pausing Asimov Press 61 upvotes, 28 comments
  21. Artemis II is not safe to fly 514 upvotes, 332 comments
  22. Bird brains (2023) 329 upvotes, 207 comments
  23. Nobody Is Coming to Save Your Career 25 upvotes, 9 comments
  24. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 73 upvotes, 39 comments
  25. 30 Years Ago, Robots Learned to Walk Without Falling 19 upvotes, 7 comments
  26. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 32 upvotes, 16 comments
  27. One of the largest salt mines in the world exists under Lake Erie 49 upvotes, 35 comments
  28. Android Developer Verification 294 upvotes, 295 comments
  29. In Expanding de Sitter Space, Quantum Mechanics Gets More Elusive 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments
